headline: Airlines Restart Flights but Disruptions are Expected to Persist

headline: Health services were experiencing difficulties in several countries.

snippet: A “historic” tech failure alarmed investors, after a security update caused problems for Microsoft devices and services, and took down businesses worldwide.
